label: Wound anchor
description: A spatial anchor that maps a wound zone to a position on the body graphic. Nested class inside BodyTypeDef.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: String tag identifying the wound zone. Used instead of group to select the anchor zone by tag name.

group.label: Group
group.description: BodyPartGroupDef identifying the wound zone by body part group. Used instead of tag.

narrowCrown.label: Narrow crown
narrowCrown.description: If set, restricts the wound zone to a narrow crown band on the head graphic. Only used for head eye anchors.

rotation.label: Rotation
rotation.description: Cardinal rotation of the anchor view. Corresponds to Verse.Rot4 values.

canMirror.label: Can mirror
canMirror.description: Whether the wound anchor may be mirrored for opposite-side rendering. Defaults to true; set to false for eye or side-specific anchors.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: World-space offset from the graphic origin as (x, y, z).

layer.label: Layer
layer.description: Whether the wound renders on the body or head overlay layer. Corresponds to PawnOverlayDrawer.OverlayLayer.

debugColor.label: Debug color
debugColor.description: Color used to visualize this anchor in debug overlay mode. Has no effect in normal play.

range.label: Range
range.description: Radius of the wound area in graphic space. Controls how large the wound decal region is.
